prompt: Create a dramatic square commercial poster for a spicy snack brand, with a fiery red storm atmosphere and high-energy food advertising style. The background is a dark crimson sky filled with glowing clouds, scattered sparks, and visible lightning bolts. In the center, a giant tornado made of swirling transparent wind rings, glossy whole red chili peppers, square corn chips, crumbs, and seasoning particles rises upward from an opened snack bag, forming a powerful vortex. The tornado should feel dynamic and explosive, with chips and chili peppers flying outward in different sizes and depths for a cinematic 3D look. At the bottom center, place a glossy red snack packet standing upright, labeled with the brand logo and product name Crispy Nachos Chips, with a spicy flavor badge reading Spicy Masala, a small chili illustration, a corn note near the bottom, and a printed image of square nacho chips on the front. Put a stylized playful logo at the top left reading SnaX in bold yellow and white script with a red outline, and a clean white platform watermark at the top right reading Pollo.ai. On the left side, add a huge stacked distressed headline in bold condensed uppercase, with the first word in golden yellow and the remaining three lines in white, reading exactly: WARNING! CRUNCH STORM INCOMING. Use intense rim lighting, glossy highlights, deep shadows, rich red-orange color grading, and a premium snack advertisement composition that feels spicy, crunchy, chaotic, and irresistible.
